description_long: This chair features a cantilevered tubular metal frame finished in a matte gray, supporting a seat and backrest made from tightly woven rattan or synthetic wicker. The seat and backrest are a continuous surface, gently curving to provide ergonomic support, while the armrests are integrated into the frame and wrapped in the same woven material. The open, sled-style base gives the chair a modern, airy appearance and allows for slight flex when seated. The woven texture is visually prominent, with a natural tan color that contrasts with the industrial metal frame. The chair is lightweight yet sturdy, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings such as parks, patios, or public waiting areas. Its design balances comfort, durability, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern cantilevered chair with a matte gray tubular metal frame and a tan woven rattan seat and backrest, featuring integrated armrests and a sled-style base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full woven seat and backrest, with both armrests curving outward and the sled base visible below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous curve of the seat and backrest, the armrest profile, and the cantilevered sled base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the woven backrest surface and the parallel alignment of the metal frame, with the sled base extending backward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ergonomic curve, armrest, and the open sled base structure.
